title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of software craftsmanship and programming best practices.

title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: A fantasy adventure following Bilbo Baggins on an unexpected journey.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: An exploration of cosmology, black holes, and the universe.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: Andrew Hunt & David Thomas
description: Timeless lessons for becoming a better software developer.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
author: J.K. Rowling
description: The first adventure of Harry Potter at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A brief history of humankind from ancient times to the present.

title: Design Patterns
author: Erich Gamma, Richard Helm, Ralph Johnson & John Vlissides
description: Classic solutions to common software design problems.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A classic novel about justice, morality, and growing up.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description: An influential book on evolution and gene-centered natural selection.

title: Introduction to Algorithms
author: Thomas H. Cormen, Charles E. Leiserson, Ronald L. Rivest & Clifford Stein
description: A comprehensive reference on algorithms and data structures.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A philosophical novel about pursuing one's dreams.
